description: Managed and executed online webinars, ensuring smooth technical delivery and high-quality user experience.
Worked with marketing and product teams to optimize webinar funnels and increase engagement and conversions.
Handled tools, automation and platforms related to webinars, improving processes and operational efficiency.
Developed dynamic web applications using HTML, CSS and JavaScript, focusing on responsive and user-friendly interfaces.
Maintained and improved existing applications by identifying and fixing bugs to ensure stability and performance.
Collaborated directly with clients to understand requirements and deliver tailored solutions.
Designed and developed web applications using React, Next.js and Node.js to strengthen practical development skills.
Integrated REST APIs and built dynamic user interfaces with focus on performance and usability.
Continuously learning and applying best practices such as clean code, component-based architecture and version control with Git.
